item.title: vault
item.description: This wiki contains protocols and other information mostly of interest to the mec group at CBMA and people working in the LGM lab.

item.title: mec...
item.description: Welcome, We are the mec research group, a part of the research center Centro de Biologia Molecular e Ambiental (CBMA).

item.title: pepparkakor
item.description: Tant Harriets pepparkakor Aunt Harriet’s gingerbread cookies Bolachas de Gengibre à moda da tia Harriet 300 gram smör/margarin 5 dl socker 1 dl sirap 2 dl vatten 1 msk ingefära (Man kan dubbla mängden) 2 msk kanel (Man kan dubbla mängden) 1 msk kryddnejlikor (Man kan dubbla mängden) 1 msk bikarbona ...

item.title: yeast cell extract
item.description: Glassbead Yeast Cell Extract for activity measurements from CURRENT PROTOCOLS IN MOLECULAR BIOLOGY www.geguchadze.com/PDF/protocols/CPonline/Toc/15848-20034.html www.geguchadze.com/PDF/protocols/CPonline/Doc/17955-17955.html Cell Disruption For Soluble Protein Using Glass Beads These procedures are ...

item.title: writing
item.description: Many of today’s students have been subjected to writing essays with minimum word counts with the implicit encouragement that writing more is better and will give you a higher grade.

item.title: vaccuum manifold
item.description: Homemade vaccuum manifold for spin columns This manifold was made from a plastic tupperware style box.

item.title: transesterification
item.description: Methylation or Trans-esterification (Lund, Dept of Biotechnology) Prepare 2% Sulfuric acid in methanol (2 mL concentrated H2SO4 in 100 mL Methanol).

item.title: tetracycline
item.description: Tetracycline 12.5 mg/ml Add 125 mg Tetracycline Hydrochloride (MW = 480.898 g/mol) powder to a 15 mL FALCON tube. Add 7 mL of Ethanol 99.5 or 96%.

item.title: standard pcr protocol
item.description: Standard PCR protocol This is a compilation of general guidelines for PCR. Most of it was lifted from the FERMENTAS website many years ago.

item.title: snik-short
item.description: Low cost E. coli plasmid alkaline lysis mini-prep Grow a culture of E. coli at 37 °C overnight. Transfer 1-2 mL of culture to a new Eppendorf tube.
